formulas.name: Definition of Business
formulas.formula: An enterprise that sells goods or services for profit.

formulas.name: Definition of Organisation
formulas.formula: A group of people working together for a common goal.

formulas.name: Types of Business Organisation
formulas.formula: Single-owner business, Partnership, Company, Co-operative Society

formulas.name: Characteristics of Sole Proprietorship
formulas.formula: Single-owner, Unlimited liability, Flexible management, Easy formation

formulas.name: Advantages of Sole Proprietorship
formulas.formula: Easy to form, Low cost, Flexibility in decision-making

formulas.name: Disadvantages of Sole Proprietorship
formulas.formula: Unlimited liability, Limited resources, Lack of professional management

formulas.name: Characteristics of Partnership
formulas.formula: Two or more owners, Shared profits and losses, Unlimited liability, Easy to form

formulas.name: Types of Partnership
formulas.formula: General Partnership, Limited Partnership, Partnership at will

formulas.name: Advantages of Partnership
formulas.formula: Sharing of risk and profit, Specialisation of skills, Easy to form

formulas.name: Disadvantages of Partnership
formulas.formula: Unlimited liability, Lack of continuity, Potential for conflict

formulas.name: Characteristics of Company
formulas.formula: Separate legal entity, Limited liability, Transferable shares, Continuous existence

formulas.name: Advantages of Company
formulas.formula: Limited liability, Transferable shares, Easy to raise capital, Separate legal entity

formulas.name: Disadvantages of Company
formulas.formula: Complexity in formation, High cost, Bureaucratic structure

formulas.name: Characteristics of Co-operative Society
formulas.formula: Member-owned, Member-controlled, Non-profit motive, Democratic decision-making

formulas.name: Advantages of Co-operative Society
formulas.formula: Member-owned, Member-controlled, Democratic decision-making, Social welfare

formulas.name: Disadvantages of Co-operative Society
formulas.formula: Limited resources, Dependence on member support, Lack of professional management
